piggyCodes.intro: Check the current Piggy Intercity code status, the demo completion reward, and the official reward channels in one place. This section focuses on rewards confirmed through Roblox, the official Piggy Discord, and official Piggy Intercity pages.

piggyReleasePlay.intro: Use the official full-version Roblox page for the current Piggy Intercity experience, and use the demo page only when checking demo-specific rewards or old demo progress rules.

piggyBeginnerGuide.title: Piggy Intercity Beginner Guide for New Players
piggyBeginnerGuide.intro: Learn what to do first in Piggy Intercity: explore Evalia, survive the infection, follow quests, meet characters, and avoid confusing the demo with the full version.

steps.title: Start on the official full-version page
steps.action: Open Piggy: Intercity [OUT NOW] on Roblox.
steps.details: The full version is the main experience for current progression. Avoid old demo pages and fan-made versions when your goal is to play the live game.

steps.title: Understand the core loop
steps.action: Explore Evalia, meet characters, complete objectives, and survive infected threats.
steps.details: Piggy Intercity is a multiplayer, choice-driven open world RPG where exploration, relationships, minigames, base building, and survival all matter.

steps.title: Pay attention to choices
steps.action: Read dialogue and quest context before rushing through interactions.
steps.details: Choices affect relationships with characters and the world around you, so early decisions are part of progression rather than throwaway text.

steps.title: Use the demo for its reward, not permanent progress
steps.action: Complete the demo for free crystals, then move to the full version.
steps.details: The demo page states that save data does not carry over to the full version, but demo completion rewards free crystals in the full version.

steps.title: Look for quests, locations, characters, and items
steps.action: Use early playtime to learn quest flow, map movement, and item use.
steps.details: The full version includes more quests, more locations, more characters, more items, more level-up attributes, base building, and minigames.

steps.title: Follow official videos for gameplay context
steps.action: Watch the official trailer and overview trailer before deep progression.
steps.details: The official videos introduce Piggy Intercity as an open-world, choice-driven multiplayer RPG and show the intended direction of the game.

piggyDemoRewards.title: Piggy Intercity Demo Rewards and Save Data
piggyDemoRewards.intro: The Piggy Intercity demo has one important rule: demo save data does not carry over to the full version, but completing the demo rewards free crystals in the full version.

faqs.question: Does Piggy Intercity demo save data carry over?
faqs.answer: No. The official demo page states that save data will not carry over into the full version of Piggy Intercity.

faqs.question: What reward do players get for completing the demo?
faqs.answer: Completing the Piggy Intercity demo rewards players with free crystals in the full version.

faqs.question: Should new players start with the demo or the full version?
faqs.answer: Players who want the current main experience should use the full-version page. Players who want the Piggy Intercity demo completion crystal reward should complete the demo first.

faqs.question: What is different between the demo and the full version?
faqs.answer: The demo is limited. The full version of Piggy Intercity includes more quests, more locations, more characters, more items, more level-up attributes, base building, minigames, and more.

faqs.question: Where should players go after finishing the demo?
faqs.answer: After completing the demo reward path, players should move to the official full-version Roblox page for the main Piggy Intercity experience.

piggyQuestsChoices.title: Piggy Intercity Quests and Story Choices
piggyQuestsChoices.intro: Follow quests, meet characters, and shape your route through Evalia. Piggy Intercity is built around NPC interactions, exploration, and choices that affect relationships and the world around you.

steps.title: Start from NPC interactions
steps.description: Speak with characters to begin story and quest activity. The core loop of Piggy Intercity is built around meeting characters, choosing responses, and moving through the open world.
steps.playerTip: Check dialogue carefully before picking a response, because choices are part of the story system.

steps.title: Explore Evalia for quest progress
steps.description: Move through the open world to find characters, objectives, survival routes, and activity points connected to quests.
steps.playerTip: Treat each new area as both a story location and a survival zone.

steps.title: Make relationship-impacting choices
steps.description: Dialogue and story choices can affect relationships with other characters and the world around the player.
steps.playerTip: Avoid rushing through dialogue when a choice appears. Piggy Intercity is designed around consequences, not just fast clicking.

steps.title: Separate demo progress from full-version progress
steps.description: The demo is a separate experience from the full version. Demo save data does not carry over into the full game.
steps.playerTip: Use the demo to learn the flow, not to build a permanent save.

steps.title: Complete the demo reward route
steps.description: Finishing the demo rewards free crystals in the full version of Piggy Intercity.
steps.playerTip: Finish the demo once before switching fully to the main release page.

piggyMapLocations.title: Piggy Intercity Map and Locations
piggyMapLocations.intro: Explore Evalia, track key activity zones, and avoid the wrong play page. Piggy Intercity takes place in an infected open world built for exploration, quests, character meetings, minigames, and base survival.

items.name: Evalia Open World
items.description: The main setting of Piggy Intercity, described as a world devastated by infection. Players explore Evalia while meeting characters, surviving threats, and progressing through choices.
items.bestFor: General exploration, story routing, and survival movement

items.name: Full Version Play Page
items.description: The primary Roblox experience for Piggy Intercity. This is the page players should use for the full release instead of older demo versions.

items.name: Demo Version Area
items.description: A separate demo experience used to preview Piggy Intercity systems. Demo save data does not transfer, but demo completion gives crystals in the full version.
items.bestFor: Learning the basics and earning the demo completion reward

items.name: Character Interaction Zones
items.description: Areas where players meet characters and make choices. These zones are central to quest pickup, relationship changes, and story movement in Piggy Intercity.

items.name: Infection Danger Routes
items.description: Exploration routes shaped by the infection threat. Survival, movement, and quest progress are tied together in the open world of Piggy Intercity.

items.name: Base Area
items.description: Piggy Intercity includes base building as part of its survival systems, giving players a personal place to build around long-term progression.

items.name: Minigame Spots
items.description: Piggy Intercity includes minigames as part of its full-version feature set, giving players activities beyond main exploration and questing.

items.name: Shopping Areas
items.description: Shopping fits the item, survival, and progression loop of Piggy Intercity, helping players prepare before exploration and danger routes.
items.bestFor: Buying useful supplies and progression items

piggyItemsWeapons.title: Piggy Intercity Items and Weapons Tier List
piggyItemsWeapons.intro: This tier list ranks the best Piggy Intercity item categories by practical value for survival, quest progress, exploration, base growth, and full-version progression.

entries.name: Quest-use items
entries.reason: Items tied to quest objectives are top priority because Piggy Intercity is structured around character interactions, choices, and open-world quest movement.

entries.name: Story interaction items
entries.reason: Items connected to NPC choices and relationship outcomes matter more than generic inventory clutter because choices affect characters and the world.

entries.name: Core survival supplies
entries.reason: Any item that keeps the player alive during exploration belongs at the top because Piggy Intercity is built around surviving the infection while moving through Evalia.

entries.name: Sturdy defensive gear
entries.reason: Defensive gear has high value in danger routes where exploration and infection threats overlap.

entries.name: Weapons
entries.reason: Weapons are valuable for handling infected threats and dangerous travel routes in Piggy Intercity.

entries.name: Tools
entries.reason: Tools are useful when exploration, objectives, and survival tasks require more than direct combat.

entries.name: Base-building resources
entries.reason: Base building is part of the full-version feature set of Piggy Intercity, making base-related resources valuable for longer sessions.

entries.name: Level-up attribute support
entries.reason: The full version includes more level-up attributes, so items and systems that support character growth are strong long-term investments.

entries.name: Shopping purchases
entries.reason: Shopping supports the item loop and gives players a practical way to prepare for exploration, quests, and survival in Piggy Intercity.

entries.name: Crystals
entries.reason: Crystals are tied to demo completion rewards in the full version, giving them value outside ordinary moment-to-moment exploration.

piggyBaseMinigames.title: Piggy Intercity Base Building and Minigames
piggyBaseMinigames.intro: Build your base, play minigames, shop, and prepare for full-version systems. Piggy Intercity includes base building, minigames, shopping, items, level-up attributes, and demo reward crystals that support longer-term play.

items.name: Base Building
items.description: Players can build their own base as part of surviving the infection in Evalia.
items.playerValue: Useful for long-term survival identity, personal progression, and repeat play.

items.name: Minigames
items.description: Minigames are included as part of the full-version feature set of Piggy Intercity.
items.playerValue: Useful for breaking up questing and exploration with repeatable side content.

items.name: Shopping
items.description: Shopping supports the item and preparation loop in Piggy Intercity.
items.playerValue: Useful for preparing before exploration, quests, and danger routes.

items.name: More Items
items.description: The full version expands beyond the demo with more items.
items.playerValue: Useful for building guides around survival loadouts, quest objects, tools, and progression supplies.

items.name: More Level-Up Attributes
items.description: The full version of Piggy Intercity includes more level-up attributes than the demo experience.
items.playerValue: Useful for build planning and route optimization.

items.name: More Quests
items.description: The full version expands the quest structure of Piggy Intercity beyond the demo.
items.playerValue: Useful for story routes, NPC choice guides, and replay planning.

items.name: More Locations
items.description: The full version expands the explorable world of Piggy Intercity with more locations.
items.playerValue: Useful for map guides, danger-route guides, and point-of-interest pages.

items.name: Demo Completion Crystals
items.description: Completing the demo rewards free crystals in the full version of Piggy Intercity.
items.playerValue: Useful for players deciding whether to finish the demo before moving to the full game.

faq.title: Piggy Intercity
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Piggy Intercity before you start exploring Evalia.

questions.question: Is Piggy Intercity a multiplayer game?
questions.answer: Yes. Piggy Intercity is a multiplayer, choice-driven open world RPG where you explore Evalia, meet characters, and survive the infection with other players.

questions.question: Where can I play Piggy Intercity?
questions.answer: You can play Piggy Intercity on the official full-version Roblox game page. A separate demo page also exists for previewing systems and earning the demo completion reward.

questions.question: Does Piggy Intercity have active redeem codes?
questions.answer: Piggy Intercity currently has no active public redeem codes listed on the official Roblox pages. Watch the official Piggy Discord and Roblox community for future reward announcements.

questions.question: Does demo save data carry over in Piggy Intercity?
questions.answer: No. The official demo page states that save data will not carry over into the full version of Piggy Intercity, but completing the demo rewards free crystals in the full version.

questions.question: What can you do in Piggy Intercity?
questions.answer: In Piggy Intercity you can explore Evalia, complete quests, meet characters, make story choices, collect items and weapons, build a base, play minigames, and survive the infection.

questions.question: Who develops Piggy Intercity?
questions.answer: Piggy Intercity is developed by MiniToon. For official updates, follow the Piggy Discord, the official Roblox community, and the MiniToon YouTube and X channels.
